sentences.sentence: In general, it is plausible to suppose that we should prefer peace and quiet to noise.
sentences.translation: 一般来说，认为我们应该更喜欢宁静而非噪音，这是合乎情理的。

structure.text: to suppose that we should prefer peace and quiet to noise
that we should prefer peace and quiet to noise

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，真正的主语是后面的 to suppose... 不定式短语。
suppose 后的 that 从句说明所作的推断；prefer A to B 表示“比起 B 更喜欢 A”。

expressions.text: it is plausible to suppose that

sentences.sentence: And yet most of us have had the experience of having to adjust to sleeping in the mountains or the countryside because it was initially 'too quiet', an experience that suggests that humans are capable of adapting to a wide range of noise levels.
sentences.translation: 然而，我们大多数人都有过这样的经历：由于山里或乡村起初“太安静”，不得不适应在那里睡觉；这种经历表明，人类能够适应范围很广的噪音水平。

structure.text: the experience of having to adjust to sleeping in the mountains or the countryside
that suggests that humans are capable of adapting to a wide range of noise levels
that humans are capable of adapting to a wide range of noise levels

difficult_points: of having to adjust... 修饰 experience，其中 adjust to 后接动名词 sleeping。
because 从句中的 it 指山里或乡村的环境，而不是某个具体物体。
逗号后的 an experience 是前面整个经历的同位语，that 从句再修饰它；第二个 that 引导 suggests 的宾语从句。

expressions.text: adapt to a wide range of

sentences.sentence: Research supports this view.
sentences.translation: 研究支持这一观点。
difficult_points: this view 回指上一句提出的人类能够适应多种噪音水平这一观点。
support 在此表示研究证据“支持、印证”某种看法。

sentences.sentence: For example, Glass and Singer (1972) exposed people to short bursts of very loud noise and then measured their ability to work out problems and their physiological reactions to the noise.
sentences.translation: 例如，Glass 和 Singer（1972）让人们接触短促而强烈的噪音，随后测量他们解决问题的能力以及对噪音的生理反应。

structure.text: exposed people to short bursts of very loud noise
their ability to work out problems and their physiological reactions to the noise

difficult_points: expose people to... 表示“使人接触……”，to 是介词。
measured 后接两个并列宾语：解决问题的能力和对噪音的生理反应。
to work out problems 后置修饰 ability，说明是哪方面的能力。

sentences.sentence: The noise was quite disruptive at first, but after about four minutes the subjects were doing just as well on their tasks as control subjects who were not exposed to noise.
sentences.translation: 噪音起初干扰很大，但大约四分钟后，受试者完成任务的表现已经和未接触噪音的对照组一样好。

structure.text: were doing just as well on their tasks as control subjects
who were not exposed to noise

difficult_points: but 连接前后两个完整分句，突出干扰由强到弱的变化。
as well ... as... 是同级比较，比较实验组与对照组完成任务的表现。
who 引导定语从句修饰 control subjects，were exposed to 是被动结构。

sentences.sentence: Their physiological arousal also declined quickly to the same levels as those of the control subjects.
sentences.translation: 他们的生理唤醒水平也迅速下降到与对照组相同的程度。

structure.text: to the same levels as those of the control subjects

difficult_points: declined to 表示“下降到”某一水平，to 引出变化的终点。
those 替代前面复数 levels，避免重复，those of the control subjects 即对照组的水平。

expressions.text: decline to the same level as

sentences.sentence: But there are limits to adaptation and loud noise becomes more troublesome if the person is required to concentrate on more than one task.
sentences.translation: 但适应能力是有限度的；如果一个人必须同时专注于多项任务，强噪音就会带来更大的麻烦。

structure.text: and loud noise becomes more troublesome
if the person is required to concentrate on more than one task

difficult_points: there are 是存在句结构，真正表达的新信息是 limits to adaptation。
and 连接两个完整分句，第二个分句说明适应受限的具体情形。
if 从句使用 be required to do 的被动结构，表示“被要求做……”。

sentences.sentence: For example, high noise levels interfered with the performance of subjects who were required to monitor three dials at a time, a task not unlike that of an aeroplane pilot or an air-traffic controller (Broadbent, 1957).
sentences.translation: 例如，高强度噪音会妨碍那些需要同时监控三个仪表的受试者的表现，这项任务与飞机驾驶员或空中交通管制员的工作颇为相似（Broadbent，1957）。

structure.text: who were required to monitor three dials at a time
not unlike that of an aeroplane pilot or an air-traffic controller (Broadbent, 1957)

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句修饰 subjects，并以被动结构说明受试者被要求完成的任务。
逗号后的 a task 是 monitor three dials at a time 这一任务的同位说明。
not unlike 是委婉的双重否定，实际表示“与……相似”；that 代替 task。

sentences.sentence: Similarly, noise did not affect a subject's ability to track a moving line with a steering wheel, but it did interfere with the subject's ability to repeat numbers while tracking (Finkelman and Glass, 1970).
sentences.translation: 同样，噪音并不影响受试者用方向盘追踪移动线条的能力，却确实会干扰其在追踪过程中复述数字的能力（Finkelman 和 Glass，1970）。

structure.text: a subject's ability to track a moving line with a steering wheel
the subject's ability to repeat numbers while tracking (Finkelman and Glass, 1970)

difficult_points: but 后的 it 回指 noise，did interfere 中 did 用于强调噪音确实造成了干扰。
两个 ability 后的不定式分别说明能力的内容，形成单任务与双任务的对照。
while tracking 是省略主语和 be 动词的状语从句，可还原为 while the subject was tracking。

sentences.sentence: Probably the most significant finding from research on noise is that its predictability is more important than how loud it is.
sentences.translation: 关于噪音的研究中，最重要的发现或许是：噪音是否可预测，比它的音量大小更重要。

structure.text: the most significant finding from research on noise
that its predictability is more important than how loud it is

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，说明研究中最重要的发现是什么。
its 指 noise；predictability 是“可预测性”，不是预测行为本身。
how loud it is 是名词性从句，作 than 后的比较对象，意为“它有多响”。

sentences.sentence: We are much more able to 'tune out' chronic background noise, even if it is quite loud, than to work under circumstances with unexpected intrusions of noise.
sentences.translation: 我们更容易对持续的背景噪音“充耳不闻”，即使它相当响；相比之下，在噪音意外闯入的环境中工作则困难得多。

structure.text: even if it is quite loud
than to work under circumstances with unexpected intrusions of noise

difficult_points: more able to... than to... 比较的是两种行为：忽略持续噪音与在突发噪音下工作。
even if 引导让步从句，it 回指 chronic background noise。
with unexpected intrusions of noise 修饰 circumstances，指噪音会意外侵入的情形。

sentences.sentence: In the Glass and Singer study, in which subjects were exposed to bursts of noise as they worked on a task, some subjects heard loud bursts and others heard soft bursts.
sentences.translation: 在 Glass 和 Singer 的研究中，受试者一边完成任务，一边接触阵发噪音；其中一些人听到强噪音，另一些人听到弱噪音。

structure.text: In the Glass and Singer study
in which subjects were exposed to bursts of noise as they worked on a task
as they worked on a task

difficult_points: in which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 study，相当于 in the study。
as 引导时间从句，表示受试者在工作时接触噪音。
others 是代词，指 other subjects；前后分句形成 loud 与 soft 的对照。

expressions.text: be exposed to bursts of noise

sentences.sentence: For some subjects, the bursts were spaced exactly one minute apart (predictable noise); others heard the same amount of noise overall, but the bursts occurred at random intervals (unpredictable noise).
sentences.translation: 对一些受试者而言，每阵噪音恰好间隔一分钟（可预测噪音）；另一些人听到的噪音总量相同，但噪音出现的间隔是随机的（不可预测噪音）。

structure.text: were spaced exactly one minute apart
heard the same amount of noise overall
but the bursts occurred at random intervals

difficult_points: 分号把两种实验条件并列对照：固定间隔与随机间隔。
were spaced 是被动语态，one minute apart 作间距补足语。
the same amount of noise overall 强调噪音总量相同，因此变量只是出现时间是否可预测。

sentences.sentence: Subjects reported finding the predictable and unpredictable noise equally annoying, and all subjects performed at about the same level during the noise portion of the experiment.
sentences.translation: 受试者报告称，可预测噪音和不可预测噪音同样令人烦躁；而且在实验的噪音阶段，所有受试者的表现大致相当。

structure.text: finding the predictable and unpredictable noise equally annoying
and all subjects performed at about the same level during the noise portion of the experiment

difficult_points: reported 后接动名词 finding 作宾语，表示受试者报告自己的感受。
finding A annoying 是“发现 A 令人烦躁”的宾语加宾补结构，equally 修饰 annoying。
and 后是完整分句，补充主观感受之外的任务表现结果。

sentences.sentence: But the different noise conditions had quite different after-effects when the subjects were required to proofread written material under conditions of no noise.
sentences.translation: 但是，当受试者被要求在无噪音条件下校对书面材料时，不同噪音条件产生的后续影响却大不相同。

structure.text: when the subjects were required to proofread written material under conditions of no noise

difficult_points: But 将实验当下表现相近与事后影响不同形成转折。
when 从句说明后续影响是在何种测试中显现的。
were required to proofread 是被动结构；under conditions of no noise 表示校对时已没有噪音。

sentences.sentence: As shown in Table 1, the unpredictable noise produced more errors in the later proofreading task than predictable noise; and soft, unpredictable noise actually produced slightly more errors on this task than the loud, predictable noise.
sentences.translation: 如表1所示，在之后的校对任务中，不可预测噪音比可预测噪音导致了更多错误；实际上，轻微但不可预测的噪音造成的错误甚至略多于强烈但可预测的噪音。

structure.text: more errors in the later proofreading task than predictable noise
and soft, unpredictable noise actually produced slightly more errors on this task than the loud, predictable noise

difficult_points: As shown... 是省略结构，可理解为 As it is shown in Table 1。
more errors ... than... 比较不可预测噪音与可预测噪音造成的错误数。
分号后的结果更反直觉：soft 与 loud 不是唯一变量，predictability 才是关键差别。

sentences.sentence: Apparently, unpredictable noise produces more fatigue than predictable noise, but it takes a while for this fatigue to take its toll on performance.
sentences.translation: 显然，不可预测噪音比可预测噪音更容易使人疲劳，但这种疲劳要过一段时间才会损害任务表现。

structure.text: but it takes a while for this fatigue to take its toll on performance
for this fatigue to take its toll on performance

difficult_points: but 后的 it 是形式主语，真正描述耗时事件的是 for this fatigue to...。
for this fatigue 是不定式的逻辑主语，说明最终产生影响的是累积的疲劳。
take its toll on 是固定表达，指逐渐造成损害，而不是立即产生影响。

expressions.text: it takes a while for ... to

sentences.sentence: Predictability is not the only variable that reduces or eliminates the negative effects of noise.
sentences.translation: 可预测性并不是唯一能够减轻或消除噪音负面影响的变量。

structure.text: that reduces or eliminates the negative effects of noise

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 variable，并在从句中作主语。
reduces 与 eliminates 是并列谓语，分别表示程度减轻与完全消除。

sentences.sentence: Another is control.
sentences.translation: 另一个变量是控制感。
difficult_points: Another 省略了 variable，承接上一句，完整意思是 another variable。
control 在这里不是单纯的“控制行为”，而是个体知道自己能够控制噪音的条件。

sentences.sentence: If the individual knows that he or she can control the noise, this seems to eliminate both its negative effects at the time and its after-effects.
sentences.translation: 如果一个人知道自己能够控制噪音，这种认知似乎就能同时消除噪音当时的负面影响和事后的影响。

structure.text: If the individual knows that he or she can control the noise
that he or she can control the noise
both its negative effects at the time and its after-effects

difficult_points: if 从句中的 that 引导 knows 的宾语从句，he or she 回指 the individual。
主句 this 指“知道自己能控制噪音”这一事实，而非 noise 本身。
both ... and... 并列噪音即时的负面影响与后续影响；两个 its 都指 noise。

sentences.sentence: This is true even if the individual never actually exercises his or her option to turn the noise off (Glass and Singer, 1972).
sentences.translation: 即使这个人实际上从未行使关闭噪音的选择权，这一点仍然成立（Glass 和 Singer，1972）。

structure.text: even if the individual never actually exercises his or her option to turn the noise off (Glass and Singer, 1972)

difficult_points: This 回指上一句“知道能够控制即可消除负面影响”的结论。
even if 引导让步从句，强调真正关闭噪音并非必要条件。
exercise one's option 表示“行使选择权”；to turn... 说明该选择权的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Just the knowledge that one has control is sufficient.
sentences.translation: 仅仅知道自己拥有控制权就足够了。
difficult_points: that 从句说明 knowledge 的具体内容，是同位语从句，而非修饰某个人的定语从句。
one 是泛指代词，表示任何处于该情境中的人。

sentences.sentence: The studies discussed so far exposed people to noise for only short periods and only transient effects were studied.
sentences.translation: 到目前为止所讨论的研究只让人们短时间接触噪音，考察的也只是暂时性影响。

structure.text: exposed people to noise for only short periods
and only transient effects were studied

difficult_points: discussed so far 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 studies，相当于 that have been discussed so far。
and 连接主动与被动两个分句：研究让人接触噪音，同时研究者考察其影响。
transient 与 short periods 相呼应，强调此前研究不涉及长期后果。

sentences.sentence: But the major worry about noisy environments is that living day after day with chronic noise may produce serious, lasting effects.
sentences.translation: 但人们对嘈杂环境最担心的是，日复一日地生活在持续噪音中可能会造成严重而持久的影响。

structure.text: the major worry about noisy environments
that living day after day with chronic noise may produce serious, lasting effects
living day after day with chronic noise

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，说明 major worry 的具体内容。
表语从句中 living... 是动名词短语作主语，may produce 是谓语。
serious 与 lasting 并列修饰 effects，强调影响既严重又持久。

sentences.sentence: One study, suggesting that this worry is a realistic one, compared elementary school pupils who attended schools near Los Angeles's busiest airport with students who attended schools in quiet neighbourhoods (Cohen et al., 1980).
sentences.translation: 一项表明这种担忧确有现实依据的研究，将就读于洛杉矶最繁忙机场附近学校的小学生，与就读于安静社区学校的学生进行了比较（Cohen 等，1980）。

structure.text: suggesting that this worry is a realistic one
that this worry is a realistic one
elementary school pupils who attended schools near Los Angeles's busiest airport
who attended schools near Los Angeles's busiest airport
with students who attended schools in quiet neighbourhoods (Cohen et al., 1980)
who attended schools in quiet neighbourhoods (Cohen et al., 1980)

difficult_points: suggesting... 是现在分词短语，补充 study 所支持的结论，逻辑主语是 One study。
compare A with B 构成主干；两组学生后各有 who 定语从句说明就读地点。
a realistic one 中 one 替代 worry，意为“一个现实存在的担忧”。

sentences.sentence: It was found that children from the noisy schools had higher blood pressure and were more easily distracted than those who attended the quiet schools.
sentences.translation: 研究发现，来自嘈杂学校的儿童血压更高，也比就读于安静学校的儿童更容易分心。

structure.text: that children from the noisy schools had higher blood pressure and were more easily distracted than those who attended the quiet schools
and were more easily distracted than those who attended the quiet schools

difficult_points: It was found that... 是非人称被动句，it 为形式主语，that 从句承载研究发现。
had 与 were 是并列谓语，共用主语 children from the noisy schools。
those 替代 children，who 从句进一步限定为就读于安静学校的儿童。

sentences.sentence: Moreover, there was no evidence of adaptability to the noise.
sentences.translation: 此外，没有证据表明这些儿童能够适应噪音。

structure.text: no evidence of adaptability to the noise

difficult_points: there was 是存在句，no evidence 是真正的新信息。
adaptability to the noise 指对噪音的适应能力，承接前文短期实验中的 adaptation。

sentences.sentence: In fact, the longer the children had attended the noisy schools, the more distractible they became.
sentences.translation: 事实上，孩子们在嘈杂学校就读的时间越长，就变得越容易分心。

structure.text: the longer the children had attended the noisy schools

difficult_points: the + 比较级..., the + 比较级... 表示两个变量同步变化，即“越……越……”。
had attended 使用过去完成时，以 became 所处的过去时间为参照，强调此前已持续就读。
distractible 是形容词作 became 的表语，意为“容易分心的”。

sentences.sentence: The effects also seem to be long lasting.
sentences.translation: 这些影响似乎还会长期持续。
difficult_points: The effects 回指血压升高和更易分心等长期噪音影响。
seem to be 表示基于证据作出的审慎判断；long lasting 作表语。

sentences.sentence: A follow-up study showed that children who were moved to less noisy classrooms still showed greater distractibility one year later than students who had always been in the quiet schools (Cohen et al., 1981).
sentences.translation: 一项后续研究表明，被转到较安静教室的儿童在一年后仍然比那些一直在安静学校就读的学生更容易分心（Cohen 等，1981）。

structure.text: that children who were moved to less noisy classrooms still showed greater distractibility one year later than students who had always been in the quiet schools (Cohen et al., 1981)
who were moved to less noisy classrooms
still showed greater distractibility one year later than students
who had always been in the quiet schools (Cohen et al., 1981)

difficult_points: that 引导 showed 的宾语从句；从句主语 children 后接 who 被动定语从句。
greater distractibility ... than students 构成比较，说明转班一年后的影响仍未消失。
第二个 who 修饰 students；had always been 用过去完成时，表示这些学生此前一直处于安静学校。

sentences.sentence: It should be noted that the two groups of children had been carefully matched by the investigators so that they were comparable in age, ethnicity, race, and social class.
sentences.translation: 需要指出的是，研究人员对两组儿童进行了细致匹配，使他们在年龄、族裔、种族和社会阶层方面具有可比性。

structure.text: that the two groups of children had been carefully matched by the investigators so that they were comparable in age, ethnicity, race, and social class
had been carefully matched by the investigators
so that they were comparable in age, ethnicity, race, and social class

difficult_points: It should be noted that... 是正式写作中的非人称结构，it 为形式主语。
had been matched 是过去完成时的被动语态，说明匹配工作在比较结果出现前已完成。
so that 引出匹配后的结果；they 指两组儿童，comparable in 列出可比的维度。
